name: Son Felip — Algaiarens beekeeping visit
description: A beekeeping experience on a regenerative-farming estate on the north coast, between Algaiarens and Cala del Pilar. Their Algaiarens sulla honey won the platinum medal at the International Honey Awards in London, among the 50 best in the world.
area: Ciutadella (Camí de Cala Pilar, fincas Son Felip y Algaiarens, costa norte)

highlights: put on the beekeeper's suit and walk among the hives
tour the honey house and taste award-winning honeys paired with produce from the estate
book your place online (new dates each month); comfortable footwear and a cap
